# MelonUI

> Open-source React component library of high-fidelity, GSAP-animated UI components for Next.js — install any component in one CLI command.

MelonUI is a drop-based component library for React and Next.js developers who want premium, physics-driven UI without the boilerplate. Every component is engineered with GSAP animation timelines, Framer Motion 3D effects, and Tailwind CSS. Components are installed directly into your project as editable source files via `npx @melonui-dev/cli add [component]` — no runtime package, no black box.

## Getting Started

- [Home](https://melonui.dev): Overview of MelonUI, design philosophy, and featured components.
- [Components Browser](https://melonui.dev/components): Browse all available components with live interactive previews and copy-paste code.
- [Documentation](https://melonui.dev/docs): Installation guide, CLI reference, and usage patterns.
- [CLI Reference](https://melonui.dev/docs/cli): How to use `npx @melonui-dev/cli add` to install components.

## Components

### Cards & 3D

- [Infinity Mirror Card](https://melonui.dev/components/infinity-mirror-card): Deep nested 3D card creating an optical illusion of infinite layers using CSS `preserve-3d` and Framer Motion spring tilt. Reacts to magnetic mouse movement with smooth `useSpring` physics.
- [Anti-Gravity Bento](https://melonui.dev/components/anti-gravity-bento): Glassmorphic bento grid where items float into zero-gravity positions on hover using Framer Motion spring animations, 3D perspective tilt, and a dynamic radial gradient spotlight.
- [Rind Peel Card](https://melonui.dev/components/peel-card): Card with a corner-peel hover animation revealing a contrasting inner layer, built with CSS transforms and GSAP.
- [Holo Ticket](https://melonui.dev/components/holo-ticket): Holographic event ticket card with shimmer effects and 3D tilt.
- [Hyper Morph Bento](https://melonui.dev/components/hyper-morph-bento): Bento grid with morphing borders and glassmorphism.
- [Kinetic Glass Grid](https://melonui.dev/components/kinetic-glass-grid): Glass grid with kinetic hover interactions.
- [Flip Card](https://melonui.dev/components/flip-card): CSS perspective flip card revealing content on both sides.

### Buttons & Actions

- [Seed Burst Button](https://melonui.dev/components/burst-button): Button that emits canvas particle bursts on click using GSAP staggered physics and gravity simulation.
- [Ripple Button](https://melonui.dev/components/ripple-button): Button with expanding ripple wave on press.
- [Juicy Switch](https://melonui.dev/components/juicy-switch): Morphing toggle switch with exaggerated squash-and-stretch animation built in GSAP.

### Cursors

- [Juicy Cursor](https://melonui.dev/components/juicy-cursor): Custom cursor that morphs into an organic blob shape following the mouse with spring physics.
- [Crosshair Cursor](https://melonui.dev/components/crosshair): Precision crosshair cursor with animated targeting rings.

### Text & Typography

- [Char Reveal](https://melonui.dev/components/char-reveal): Animates text character-by-character on scroll or trigger. Supports scramble, fade, and typewriter modes.
- [Melon Drip Text](https://melonui.dev/components/melon-drip-text): Text with a dripping liquid animation effect.
- [Scramble Text](https://melonui.dev/components/scramble-text): Text that scrambles through random characters before resolving to the final string.
- [Chromatic Melt Text](https://melonui.dev/components/chromatic-melt-text): Text with RGB channel-shift chromatic aberration melt effect.
- [Rind Scanner Text](https://melonui.dev/components/rind-scanner-text): Text with an animated scan-line reveal effect.
- [Sticker Stack Text](https://melonui.dev/components/sticker-stack-text): Text rendered as stacked sticker layers with offset shadows.
- [Glyph Orbit Text](https://melonui.dev/components/glyph-orbit-text): Characters that orbit their original positions using GSAP timelines.
- [Seedwave Text](https://melonui.dev/components/seedwave-text): Text with organic wave motion applied per character.
- [Parallax Strips](https://melonui.dev/components/parallax-strips): Horizontal text strips scrolling at different speeds for a layered parallax depth effect.

### Navigation & Layout

- [Magnetic Nav](https://melonui.dev/components/magnetic-nav): Navigation dock where icons magnetically attract toward the cursor using GSAP magnetic field simulation.
- [Breadcrumb Trail](https://melonui.dev/components/breadcrumb-trail): Animated breadcrumb navigation component.
- [Orbital Command Ring](https://melonui.dev/components/orbital-command-ring): Circular radial menu expanding from a center point with orbiting action buttons.

### Inputs & Forms

- [Tag Input](https://melonui.dev/components/tag-input): Animated token/tag input field where tags animate in and out with spring transitions.
- [Vine Input](https://melonui.dev/components/vine-input): Input with organic vine-growth animation on focus.

### Backgrounds & Scenes

- [Particle Background](https://melonui.dev/components/particle-background): WebGL/canvas particle field background with physics interactions.
- [Luminous Waves](https://melonui.dev/components/luminous-waves): Animated luminous wave background using canvas rendering.
- [Retro Grid](https://melonui.dev/components/retro-grid): Animated perspective grid background in the style of retro synthwave aesthetics.
- [Noise Blob](https://melonui.dev/components/noise-blob): Organic morphing blob shape using Perlin noise on canvas.
- [Matrix Rain](https://melonui.dev/components/matrix-rain): Classic matrix digital rain effect rendered on canvas.
- [Retro CRT Background](https://melonui.dev/components/retro-crt-background): CRT monitor scanline and noise background effect.
- [Floating Orbs](https://melonui.dev/components/floating-orbs): Softly animated floating orb particles with blur glow.
- [Magnetic Particle Field](https://melonui.dev/components/magnetic-particle-field): Particle field that clusters and repels around the cursor.
- [Signal Loom](https://melonui.dev/components/signal-loom): Animated signal/frequency visualization background.

### Transitions & Effects

- [Rind Wipe Transition](https://melonui.dev/components/rind-wipe-transition): Full-screen page transition with diagonal wipe using GSAP.
- [Morph Transition](https://melonui.dev/components/morph-transition): Page transition with organic shape morphing.
- [Harvest Reveal](https://melonui.dev/components/harvest-reveal): Scroll-triggered content reveal using CSS clip-path animation.

### Carousels & Interactive

- [Solar Carousel](https://melonui.dev/components/solar-carousel): 3D carousel with perspective orbital motion.
- [Sticker Wall](https://melonui.dev/components/sticker-wall): Draggable sticker wall with physics-based placement.
- [Sticker Collage Wall](https://melonui.dev/components/sticker-collage-wall): Collage-style wall of randomly rotated sticker elements.
- [Kinetic Magnet](https://melonui.dev/components/kinetic-magnet): Element that magnetically follows cursor with spring physics.

### Specialty

- [CLI Terminal](https://melonui.dev/components/cli-terminal): Animated terminal window that types out commands with a cursor. Used for displaying install instructions.
- [Morphing Cyber Node](https://melonui.dev/components/morphing-cyber-node): Cyberpunk-aesthetic node with radar scanning animation.
- [Quantum Lens Decoder](https://melonui.dev/components/quantum-lens-decoder): Lens distortion effect over content with decoding animation.
- [Glitch Pulse Core](https://melonui.dev/components/glitch-pulse-core): RGB glitch and pulse effect for cyberpunk UI elements.

### Changelog & Updates

- [Changelog](https://melonui.dev/components/changelog): Accordion-style versioned release list with smooth GSAP height animation.

## Technical Details

- **Framework:** Next.js 14+ (App Router), React 18+
- **Animation:** GSAP (GreenSock) for timeline and physics animations; Framer Motion for spring-based 3D interactions
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v3
- **Language:** TypeScript — all components fully typed with exported prop interfaces
- **Install method:** `npx @melonui-dev/cli add [component-name]` — copies source into your project, no runtime dependency
- **License:** Open-source (MIT)

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/dhruvgugnani/melon-ui): Source code, issues, and contribution guide.
